sourceTitle: GenAI and academic integrity in assessment | Teaching & Learning — UCL
verificationNotes: UCL's 3-category assessment framework for GenAI use: Category 1 (own work only), Category 2 (GenAI permitted with acknowledgement), Category 3 (essential GenAI use). Explains academic misconduct rules, no GenAI detectors used, marker conversations approach. HTTP 200, full content confirmed.
